languages.text: {n}Великан молчит. Кажется, вы физически ощущаете волны разочарования, исходящие от фигуры.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Великан молчит. Кажется, вы физически ощущаете волны разочарования, исходящие от фигуры.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The giant says nothing. You almost feel the waves of disappointment rolling off his figure.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Великан молчит. Кажется, вы физически ощущаете волны разочарования, исходящие от фигуры.{/n}

languages.text: {n}巨人一言不发。你几乎能感受到阵阵失望之感正从他身上散发出来。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The giant says nothing. You almost feel the waves of disappointment rolling off his figure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}巨人一言不发。你几乎能感受到阵阵失望之感正从他身上散发出来。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El gigante no dice nada. Casi puedes sentir la decepción emanar de su cuerpo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The giant says nothing. You almost feel the waves of disappointment rolling off his figure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El gigante no dice nada. Casi puedes sentir la decepción emanar de su cuerpo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le géant garde le silence. Sa déception est presque palpable.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The giant says nothing. You almost feel the waves of disappointment rolling off his figure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le géant garde le silence. Sa déception est presque palpable.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dev adam hiçbir şey söylemiyor. Figüründen yayılan hayal kırıklığı dalgalarını hissedebiliyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The giant says nothing. You almost feel the waves of disappointment rolling off his figure.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Riese sagt nichts. Du kannst seine Enttäuschung beinahe körperlich fühlen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The giant says nothing. You almost feel the waves of disappointment rolling off his figure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Riese sagt nichts. Du kannst seine Enttäuschung beinahe körperlich fühlen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}巨人は何も言わない。その姿から失望の波が押し寄せてくるのを、あなたはほとんど感じ取れるほどだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The giant says nothing. You almost feel the waves of disappointment rolling off his figure.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}巨人は何も言わない。その姿から失望の波が押し寄せてくるのを、あなたはほとんど感じ取れるほどだ。{/n}
